blended.narrative: Mount Snow is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days. Mild temps with highs near 44°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: light rain showers, highs of 50°F.
Friday: 2.5" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.
Saturday: 3.3" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Tuesday: 2.1" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
